page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m1.6xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.u2i family. It features 24 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz, with a single thread per core configuration. The instance is provisioned with 24.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 1.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps. The hardware configuration presents a distinct tradeoff, offering a high count of dedicated physical compute cores relative to a constrained memory footprint. This resource profile is structured for workloads requiring parallel CPU processing capacity without large memory requirements.

Appropriate workloads for this instance profile include parallelized compute tasks, batch processing, and CPU-bound utility services that do not require local disk storage or extensive memory caching.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m1.6xlarge is an x86_64 compute-focused server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 2.7 GHz with a single thread per core, paired with 24.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a 1:1 ratio of memory to cores, prioritizing raw parallel processing power over memory capacity. The instance includes no local storage and no GPU accelerators, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for highly parallelized, CPU-bound workloads that operate within a compact memory footprint, such as distributed batch processing, parallelized calculations, and lightweight containerized services.
